backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that integrates with Google Custom Search API via HTTP outcalls, exposing a `proxyGoogleSearch` function and a `transform` callback for response transformation.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the frontend search flow feature to its relevant files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes using OKLCH color values for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'Study Tools' with a noindex/nofollow robots meta tag and a neutral educational description, mounting the React app at `#root`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders `BrowserLayout` alongside a dark-themed Sonner toaster with custom OKLCH color styles.
frontend/src/components/AddressBar.tsx: Smart address bar component that detects URL vs. search input, syncs with external URL state when unfocused, and submits navigation on Enter or arrow button click.
frontend/src/components/BrowserLayout.ts: Main browser chrome component wiring together tabs, address bar, proxy/search mutations, and content rendering, handling navigation, reload, and home actions.
frontend/src/components/CloakButton.tsx: Falcon cloak button with a dropdown to select a cloaking mode (about:blank, https://error, or a numeric string) that triggers the `useCloaking` hook on click.
frontend/src/components/ProxyContent.tsx: Renders proxied web content inside an iframe, injecting a base tag for relative URL resolution and intercepting link clicks and form submissions to route navigation through the app.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Displays a list of Google search results with title, snippet, and display URL, handling empty states and click-to-navigate behavior.
frontend/src/components/TabBar.tsx: Renders a browser-style tab bar with support for switching, closing, and adding tabs, including a loading indicator for active fetches.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCloaking.ts: Provides a cloak function that opens the current app in a new popup window disguised with a configurable fake URL (about:blank, error page, or numeric string).
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and status tracking using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposed via a React context provider and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query mutations for proxying URLs and performing Google searches via the ICP backend actor, including response parsing and error handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabManager.ts: Manages multi-tab browser state (add, close, switch, update) with each tab holding URL, content, search results, and loading/error status.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Inter and JetBrains Mono fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark 'Cheetah' theme using OKLCH CSS variables along with custom utility classes for glows and thin scrollbars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the App component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Cheetah brand colors (OKLCH-based), Inter/JetBrains Mono fonts, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for the Cheetah Browser, tracking existing features, pending feature requests (Google Custom Search integration with engine ID a566dfe30b89f4713), and architectural notes.
